creator: ftigeot@wolfpond.org
text:
Commit fae2d9b093a96b139b6e7f26427903c6a64c1874 in sys/dev/ichwd added new PCI ids:
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd/commit/fae2d9b093a96b139b6e7f26427903c6a64c1874

Unfortunately, only 3 of them were added to the ichwd_devices[] device list in the driver.

DEVICEID_LPT3 to LPT31 have to be added in order for all Lynx Point variants to be supported.
